title: Illegal election influencer to be prosecuted in Latvia
summary_full: On February 25th, the State Security Service (VDD) urged the prosecutor's office to initiate criminal proceedings against a Latvian citizen for unlawfully influencing the choice of several voters in last year's municipal elections in the Cēsis municipality.
